overall.description: A cinematic first-person walkthrough of a futuristic upscale lounge interior from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring neon green and pink lighting, vertical bamboo gardens, reflective marble floors, and patrons seated in modern furniture with glowing bases. The camera moves smoothly through the space, revealing digital advertisements and glass-walled terrariums.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale hotel lobby entrance with terrarium

events.description: passing the illuminated terrarium and entering the main lounge area

agents.ego_description: walking past the entrance terrarium and into the lounge area, observing the seating arrangements

notable_agents.action: patron in white hat sitting in modern lounge chair near the entrance
patron with pink hair seated on leather sofa

entered.detail: dark metallic elevator doors with silver trim at the entrance area
large glass enclosure with tropical plants and blue neon edge lighting
rounded dark chairs with glowing pink-purple circular bases
tall bamboo plants lining the right wall behind glass panels
large illuminated display showing abstract patterns on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the entrance of a futuristic lounge, featuring a glass elevator and an illuminated plant terrarium. The camera walks forward past the terrarium, revealing modern lounge chairs with glowing neon bases and a dense bamboo garden lining the right wall. A few patrons are seated sparsely throughout the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: main lounge seating area with gaming tables

events.description: camera slows slightly while passing the group playing chess at the central table
passing under vibrant pink and blue neon ceiling light strips

agents.ego_description: walking through the main lounge area, observing patrons seated at tables and playing games

notable_agents.action: group of three patrons gathered around a low table playing chess or board game
patron with bright green hair and yellow jacket seated in lounge chair

entered.detail: three patrons seated around a low black coffee table with chess pieces
rectangular dark table with glassware and chess pieces on top
long curved black leather sofa along the bamboo wall
linear pink and green neon tubes running along the reflective ceiling
hanging digital screens displaying colorful abstract graphics

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into the lounge, entering a moderately crowded seating area where patrons gather around low tables. A prominent group plays chess at a central table, while neon ceiling strips cast pink and green reflections across the marble floor. The bamboo garden continues along the right wall, now closer to the camera.

events.description: moving past the main seating cluster into a more open corridor area

agents.ego_description: continuing down the length of the lounge, passing scattered patrons seated along the bamboo wall

notable_agents.action: patron in blue shirt relaxing on the leather banquette seating

entered.detail: vertical cylindrical light fixtures mounted on the bamboo garden wall
transparent glass dividers with black frames separating lounge sections
large illuminated displays showing product advertisements on the far left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera progresses through the mid-section of the lounge, leaving the chess players behind and entering a more open corridor. Illuminated wall sconces line the bamboo garden wall on the right, while glass partitions appear on the left. The crowd thins out as the camera approaches the far end of the lounge.

scene_state.functional_zone: lounge far end with advertisement walls

events.description: approaching the far end of the lounge with large illuminated advertisement displays

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the lounge corridor, observing the large digital advertisements on the left wall

notable_agents.action: patron with red hair seated near the end of the bamboo wall

entered.detail: tall backlit poster displays featuring product advertisements and brand imagery
dark entranceway at the far end of the lounge leading to another area

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the far end of the lounge, where large illuminated advertisement posters dominate the left wall. The bamboo garden continues along the right side, and a doorway arch is visible at the corridor's end. The camera moves steadily toward this transition point, passing the last few seated patrons.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a futuristic lounge that transitions from a quiet entrance into a vibrant social hub before narrowing into a corridor of digital advertisements. It begins by passing a glass elevator and an illuminated plant terrarium, moving past modern lounge chairs with glowing neon bases and a dense bamboo garden. As the camera pushes deeper into the space, the environment becomes more crowded, shifting toward a central seating area where patrons play chess under pink and green neon ceiling strips that reflect off the marble floor. The scene then opens into a more sparse mid-section, gliding past illuminated wall sconces and glass partitions as the crowd thins. Finally, the camera progresses toward the far end of the lounge, passing large illuminated advertisement posters on the left before moving steadily toward a distant doorway arch.
